title: Clemency. Subject to conditions as may be provided in the Department's
content: 19 Rules of Procedure in the Adjudication of Cases, a foreign principal/employer imposed 20 with permanent disqualification, or a partner, officer, or a director of an LMA whose license 21 has been cancelled, or a suspended/permanently disqualified seafarer, may file a Motion 22 for Clemency, Motion to Delist from Derogatory Record, or Motion for Commutation of 23 Penalty, as the case may be, with the Adjudication Bureau. 24 25 26 ASSISTANCE TO SEAFARER 27 28 29 Assistance to Seafarer 30 31

metadata.source_file: [NOTICE TO PUBLIC] CLEAN DRAFT OF THE DMW SEABASED RULES.pdf
